Who We Are

The Corridor Specialists

CIS Hauliers Limited is Kenya's trusted name in heavy haulage, crane hire, and project logistics — operating across the critical Mombasa–Nairobi–Uganda Corridor and beyond. From the port's edge to your project site, we move what others won't.

With a fleet of low-bed trailers, flatbeds, crane-equipped rigs, excavators, graders, and rollers, we handle oversized machinery, industrial equipment, oil & gas infrastructure, and bulk cargo with precision. Our operators are certified, experienced, and safety-first — every load, every time.

15+

What We Do

Our Services

01
Heavy Haulage

Low-bed and flatbed transportation of oversized and overweight cargo — construction machinery, industrial plant, tanks, and OOG freight — across East Africa.

Low-bedsFlatbedsOOG CargoWide Load
02
Mobile Crane Hire

Mobile crane hire from 10T to 50T capacity with certified operators. Ideal for port lifts, factory installations, construction sites, and infrastructure projects requiring precision lifting.

10T – 50TPort LiftsFactory InstallsCertified Ops24hr Hire
03
Excavator & Backhoe Hire

Hire of JCB, Hitachi, and CAT excavators and backhoe loaders for earthmoving, trenching, demolition, site clearing, and foundation work on construction and civil projects.

JCBHitachiCATTrenchingEarthmoving
04
Motor Grader Hire

SEM and CAT motor graders for road grading, levelling, and finishing of unpaved roads, airstrips, construction sites, and large earthworks projects across the region.

SEM GradersCATRoad WorksLevellingAirstrips
05
Roller Compactor Hire

Smooth drum and padfoot roller compactors for road base compaction, asphalt laying, soil stabilisation, and foundation preparation on civil and infrastructure projects.

Smooth DrumPadfootAsphaltCompaction
06
Plant Operations

Full plant operations management — certified plant operators, scheduled maintenance, fuel management, and on-site supervision for long-term construction and mining contracts.

OperatorsMaintenanceMiningLong-term
07
Bulldozer Hire

Powerful bulldozers for land clearing, pushing large quantities of soil, demolition, and rough terrain grading — suitable for mining, road construction, and large-scale civil works.

Land ClearingDemolitionMiningCivil Works
08
Port Operations

Specialised cargo reception and transport direct from Mombasa Port. Container off-loading, RoRo handling, and bonded cargo transport with full documentation support.

RoRoContainerBondedMombasa
09
24/7 Emergency Haulage

Round-the-clock emergency transport for critical infrastructure, oil & gas breakdowns, and time-sensitive industrial deliveries across the corridor.

EmergencyOil & GasNight Ops

Why Choose Us

Built on Trust

24/7 GPS Tracking

Real-time visibility of every load across the entire corridor. Know exactly where your cargo is, always.

Fully Insured GIT

Comprehensive Goods in Transit insurance on all loads. Your cargo is protected from port to destination.

Certified Operators

All crane, plant, and heavy-haul operators are fully certified to Kenya Roads Board and industry standards.

On-Time Delivery

Strict schedule adherence with proactive communication. Project timelines are non-negotiable to us.

Let's Move It

Request a Quote

Tell us about your load — size, weight, route, and timeline — and our team will get back to you within 2 hours with a competitive quote tailored to your project.
